full_citation: Standard cross-school parallel identifications from comparative Buddhist textual scholarship. Individual links cite specific references below.

links.note: Lokakṣema tr. Aṣṭasāhasrikā (道行般若經) parallels Tibetan Daśasāhasrikā Prajñāpāramitā. Both are Prajñāpāramitā recensions. Conze, The Prajñāpāramitā Literature (1978), ch. 2.
Kumārajīva tr. Aṣṭasāhasrikā (小品般若波羅蜜經) parallels Tibetan Aṣṭadaśasāhasrikā. Both are Prajñāpāramitā recensions. Conze, The Prajñāpāramitā Literature (1978), ch. 2.
Dharmarakṣa tr. Pañcaviṃśatisāhasrikā (光讚般若波羅蜜經) contains Heart Sutra material. Nattier, 'The Heart Sutra: A Chinese Apocryphal Text?' (1992).

Dharmakṣema tr. Mahāparinirvāṇasūtra (大般涅槃經, 36 fascicles) parallels Tibetan Mahāparinirvāṇamahāsūtra. T374 (40 fasc.) is the extended version; T375 is the earlier translation. Shimoda Masahiro, A Study of the Mahāparinirvāṇa-sūtra (1997).
寶篋印陀羅尼經 (Ratnakāraṇḍaka-dhāraṇī) parallels Tibetan Kāraṇḍavyūhasūtra. CBETA maps Toh 116 to T1050; T1077 is an alternative translation.
Mahīśāsaka Vinaya (五分律, Buddhajīva tr.) parallels Mūlasarvāstivāda Vinayavastu. Cross-school Vinaya parallel. Frauwallner, The Earliest Vinaya and the Beginnings of Buddhist Literature (1956).
Dharmaguptaka Vinaya (四分律, Buddhayaśas tr.) parallels Mūlasarvāstivāda Vinayakṣudrakavastu. Cross-school Vinaya parallel. Frauwallner (1956); Clarke, Vinaya Texts (2014).
Sarvāstivāda Vinaya (十誦律, Kumārajīva/Puṇyatāra tr.) parallels Mūlasarvāstivāda Vinayavastu. Cross-school Vinaya parallel. Frauwallner (1956).

Mahāprajñāpāramitopadeśa (大智度論, Kumārajīva tr.) is a commentary on the Prajñāpāramitā. Toh 3786 (Abhisamayālaṃkāra) is also a Prajñāpāramitā commentary. Both are part of the Prajñāpāramitā commentarial tradition. Conze (1978).

errors.note: Dīrghāgama (長阿含經) → Saddharmasmṛtyupasthāna. These are very different texts (early Buddhist collection vs. Mahāyāna treatise on mindfulness). Parallel relationship is unclear.
Mahāprajñāpāramitopadeśa → Nandimitrāvadāna. The connection between these texts is unclear. Toh 334 is an avadāna narrative, not a Prajñāpāramitā text.
T49n2034 (開元釋教錄, Kāiyuán Catalog) is a bibliographic catalog, not a parallel text to Toh 259 (Vimalagarbha-dhāraṇī). This mapping appears to be an error.
